## Business Coaching for Home Service Owners

## Meet the Team

## Experience world-class coaching that sharpens your leadership and fuels your growth.

[Get Your Free Session](https://bluediamondconsultants.com/about/meet-the-team/#contact)

# Meet the Experts

## Jim Clark

Jim Clark, owner of Blue Diamond Consultants, started his career as a sales engineer for a commercial and industrial HVAC company. He then started his own environmental consulting company to help give people healthier air quality in their homes. Over 12 years, he grew that HVAC company from the ground up into an 8-figure operation with 93 employees and eventually sold it for 8 figures. With razor-sharp precision, Jim can cut straight to the root of a problem. He brings rare operational and financial mastery.

## Mike Disney

Michael Disney, owner and founder of Winding River Recruiting, is a dynamic entrepreneur and business leader with a passion for operational excellence and growth strategies in the Home Service industry. Over the past decade, he has coached and empowered nearly a thousand Home Service Businesses, leaving an indelible mark on the industry. Michael’s extensive experience spans across Retail Management, Home Service Sales and Operations, as well as the Automotive sector.

## Julie Vena

Julie Vena, Director of Consulting at Blue Diamond Consultants, is a dynamic business strategist, coach, and consultant with leadership experience in the home services industry, including HVAC, plumbing, and electrical. Julie brings a high-energy, strength-based approach to every client engagement — blending strategic insight with an unwavering belief in the potential of people.
